mapper.select: SELECT * FROM software_types WHERE active = true ORDER BY category ASC, name ASC
SELECT * FROM software_types ORDER BY category ASC, name ASC
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM software_types ORDER BY category
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM software_types WHERE LOWER(category) = LOWER(#{category}) AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
SELECT * FROM software_types WHERE LOWER(category) = LOWER(#{category}) AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO software_types (category, name, description, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{category}, #{name}, #{description}, #{active}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE software_types SET category=#{category}, name=#{name}, description=#{description}, active=#{active}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
